cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out who Bob is dancing with at the end of the dance after all those partner swaps. Swap: - Bob gets Lola - Dave gets Karl Now: - Bob with Lola - Dave with Karl Others: - Alice with Helga - Claire with Patrick - Eve with Sam **Step 4: Bob and Eve switch partners.** Bob has Lola, Eve has Sam. Swap: - Bob gets Sam - Eve gets Lola New pairings: - Bob with Sam - Eve with Lola Others: - Dave with Karl - Alice with Helga - Claire with Patrick **Step 5: Bob and Claire switch partners.** Bob is with Sam, Claire is with Patrick.
